title: Appearing Disappearing Rei
wikitext:
[]: Appearing-Disappearing Rei             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Apr 23, 2007 8:27 pm theres was an earlier thread about how Rei always appeared before people died, like Misato and Ritsuko. theres was also an arguement that Asuka was staring and screaming "I'LL KILL YOU!" at her before her Eva was destroyed. well, in the 1st episode, when Shinji is wating for Misato. there was that instance where Rei appeared and disappeared. was that because Shinji was going to die, but Misato saved him?

[]:             Quote Post by Ayana-Me » Mon Apr 23, 2007 8:35 pm No one really has a coherent explanation for Rei's brief appearance in episode 1. I don't really think it had to do with Shinji's death, since she only appeared to people who were in the process of dying (Ritsuko being shot, Misato dying in puddle of blood). Also, since Rei had not returned to Lillith until the end, it wouldn't make sense for her to appear for that reason.

[]:             Quote Post by Jay911 » Tue Apr 24, 2007 12:15 am I always figured Rei's appearance in ep1 was "her" checking out the new kid in town, so to speak. Knowing that Shinji was there for the reason he was. Kind of an Eva version of "HAY GUYS WHATS GOIN ON".

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Tue Apr 24, 2007 1:05 am somehow i dont even think it was Rei at all... i think it was in fact Lilith in control there more than it was Rei...somehow acknowledging his presence... although the whole...mysterious character...seen from afar...and then "poof" is kind of an anime trope...

[]:             Quote Post by Ayana-Me » Tue Apr 24, 2007 3:20 pm master0rolando wrote: although the whole...mysterious character...seen from afar...and then "poof" is kind of an anime trope...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Apr 24, 2007 4:39 pm Rei in episode 1 and Rei in 26'=Rei III. (Basically, because Rei III is the one depicted in her schooluniform, and since Rei II is at NERV while Rei I is inside zerogoki, that leaves Rei III as being the one who appeared in episode 1.) Why Bookend Rei was there in episode 1, I figure it was Rei III/Lilith's way of already showing how she watches over humanity. *shrug* "I have no bloody clue, fanwank something." ...Isn't there already some thread about this somewhere??

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Apr 24, 2007 5:10 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: ...Isn't there already some thread about this somewhere??

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Apr 24, 2007 5:21 pm I was thinking of some other thread. This one's okay though, since it's "newer". Uh...somewhat off-topic, but this is something I'm wondering about since "I dunno lol" if anybody really addressed it: Anyone else besides me think Rei on Shinji's mental train/personal hell= Rei III??

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Apr 24, 2007 5:27 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Anyone else besides me think Rei on Shinji's mental train/personal hell= Rei III??

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Apr 24, 2007 10:12 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Sailor Star Dust wrote: Anyone else besides me think Rei on Shinji's mental train/personal hell= Rei III??

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Apr 24, 2007 10:27 pm *Off Topic* Sachiel_13, I dig your sig.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Apr 24, 2007 10:31 pm THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: *Off Topic* Sachiel_13, I dig your sig.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Apr 24, 2007 10:32 pm BrikHaus wrote: I wrote: *Off Topic* Sachiel_13, I dig your sig.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Apr 24, 2007 10:41 pm same here, i'll change the size right now

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Apr 24, 2007 10:45 pm Sachiel_13 wrote: same here, i'll change the size right now

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Apr 24, 2007 10:46 pm but now its too small

[]:             Quote Post by V » Wed Apr 25, 2007 5:48 am Anyone else besides me think Rei on Shinji's mental train/personal hell= Rei III??

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Thu Apr 26, 2007 7:19 pm I always thought of the blink-and-you-miss-her Reis as being the same sort of thing as the cyclic "Isn't this where we came in?" at the beginning/end of Pink Floyd's The Wall. I mean, they're both repeating stories, although somewhat different in the manner of repetition...

[]:             Quote Post by V » Thu Apr 26, 2007 10:32 pm a question though: Rei/Lilith appears to the dying Ritsuko and Misato actually BEFORE 3-I begins....so why not to Asuka?

[]:             Quote Post by Jay911 » Thu Apr 26, 2007 10:36 pm V wrote: a question though: Rei/Lilith appears to the dying Ritsuko and Misato actually BEFORE 3-I begins....so why not to Asuka?
